completion_criteria_checked: a local helper script exists under scripts/
the helper updates .cockpit/state/project-state.json and .cockpit/state/task-state.json consistently for PASS
the helper is local and deterministic rather than chat-driven
risks: The helper currently writes task_status 'verified_pass' on PASS and leaves completion/next-task drafting to advisor-verifier workflow.
The helper writes state files before post-write validation; if validation fails, the repo requires manual correction.
summary: Claude completed the deterministic state-advance helper task within scope and returned adequate evidence in the required format.
next_action: Decide whether PASS should deterministically map to verified_pass or complete, then use the helper in the next real product-work cycle.
